assertion_results.text: Step 2.3.5 dependency chain context identifies criterion as a dev-only dependency based on its presence in [dev-dependencies] in the manifest
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md Step 2.3.5 section explicitly states: 'backend (workspace) -> criterion (direct dev-dependency)', 'Profile: dev-only ([dev-dependencies] in backend/Cargo.toml)', 'NOT present in production builds -- used for benchmarks only'. Scope assessment confirms: 'Scope: [dev-dependencies] -- dev-only'. Manifest evidence shows the [dev-dependencies] section with criterion = "0.5.1".

assertion_results.text: The dependency scope decision tree classifies criterion as 'dev-only — not shipped in production' and applies the dev-dependency remediation handling
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 43-53 state: 'Shipped in production?: NO' and list 'Remediation handling per decision tree:' with four specific actions (create tasks, add dev-dependency label, override priority to Normal, include dev/build-only note). remediation.md lines 8-9 confirm: 'Dev-dependency override: criterion is a dev-only dependency; priority overridden to Normal, dev-dependency label applied'.

assertion_results.text: Remediation tasks include the dev-dependency label in the labels array: labels contain 'dev-dependency' alongside 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', and the CVE ID
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 labels (line 17): 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-99001', 'dev-dependency'. Task 2 labels (line 87): 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-99001', 'dev-dependency'. Pseudocode (lines 145, 155) also shows all four labels in the arrays. All four required labels are present in both tasks.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task priority is set to Normal regardless of the CVE severity (CVSS 5.3 Medium) — the priority override is applied per the decision tree
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 Priority (line 19): 'Normal'. Task 2 Priority (line 89): 'Normal'. The override is explicitly documented: 'priority overridden to Normal' (line 9) and the Dev-Dependency Summary table states 'Priority override | Normal (overrides CVE severity of Medium/5.3)' (line 205). version-impact.md line 50 confirms: 'Override priority to Normal regardless of CVE severity (Medium/5.3)'.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task description includes a note indicating the dependency is dev/build-only and not shipped in production
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 description (lines 37-38): 'This dependency is dev/build-only and is not shipped in production. Remediation priority is Normal (supply chain risk only).' Task 2 description (lines 106-107): identical note. Task 1 implementation notes (lines 49-51) further state: 'Dependency scope: dev-only ([dev-dependencies] in backend/Cargo.toml) -- NOT shipped in production. Used for benchmarks only.'
